rule_metadata.name: sysctl
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'sysctl' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule sysctl
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'sysctl' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "sysctl"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /sysctl\s\-w\snet\.ipv4\.icmp_echo_ignore_all\=1/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
